title: dracaena fruticosa
intro: Dracaena fruticosa, also known as the Pleomele or Hawaiian hibiscus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asparagaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Dracaena fruticosa include reducing stress, improving sleep, and lowering blood pressure, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, Dracaena fruticosa is often made into teas, infusions, and tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
